title: Balanced Anvils
description: Makes anvil experience costs make more sense.
body:
Balanced Anvils =============== Makes anvil penalties (experience cost, anvil usage increase) of certain anvil interactions more balanced. Balanced Anvils is fully functional as a **server-side mod**, but can be installed on the client and used in singleplayer too. --- Features -------- The experience costs added by repairing and renaming are removed. The anvil usages will not increase for renaming/repairing items. In other words, if the **result** does not have **different enchantments** compared to the **first item**, the interaction will be free. Otherwise, it will cost experience and increase the anvil uses.
**Example Cases** | Slot 1 | Slot 2 | Result | Is It Free? | |---|---|---|---| | Netherite Sword | *Rename* | Renamed Netherite Sword | Yes | | Broken Diamond Sword | Diamonds | Repaired Diamond Sword | Yes | | Broken Copper Sword | Broken Copper Sword | Repaired Copper Sword | Yes | | Broken Iron Sword
*Sharpness V* | Broken Iron Sword
*Sharpness IV* | Repaired Iron Sword
*Sharpness V* | Yes | | Golden Axe
*Efficiency III* | Golden Axe
*Efficiency III* | Golden Axe
*Efficiency IV* | No | | Fishing Rod
*Unbreaking III* | Book
*Mending* | Fishing Rod
*Unbreaking III, Mending* | No |
